description_long: This is a large, rectangular table with a thick, polished wooden top featuring a natural wood grain pattern. The tabletop is supported by three wide, rectangular black bases that are evenly spaced beneath it, giving the table a modern and sturdy appearance. The wood surface appears smooth and well-finished, likely treated for durability and weather resistance. The black bases contrast sharply with the warm brown of the wood, adding a contemporary aesthetic. There are no visible decorative elements, drawers, or attached seating, emphasizing a minimalist design. The table is suitable for communal or public use, such as in parks, plazas, or urban gathering spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular table with a thick, polished wood top and three wide black support bases, designed for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden tabletop and all three black support bases.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop and a single visible black base beneath the center.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and three black bases.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the tabletop thickness and one central base.
